---
title: "An AI + LLM Primer"
---

:::{.column-page-inset-right}

{{< revealjs file="/slides/90-ai_primer.html" height="500px" class="ratio ratio-16x9" >}}

:::

# Slide Contents

{{< include /slides/90-ai_primer.qmd >}}

# Code

:::{.column-page-inset}

`code/demos/ai-01-chatlas-github.py`

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/ai-01-chatlas-github.py >}}
```

`code/demos/ai-02-dotenv.py`

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/ai-02-dotenv.py >}}
```

`code/demos/ai-03-tools.py`

```{.python}
{{< include /../code/demos/ai-03-tools.py >}}
```

:::
